_comment: Single source of truth for macro indicators (Plan A Tier 1). NOT YET wired into index.html render — see PLAN-macro-json.md for remaining steps. Each value carries a 'source' = the FRED / Trading Economics series ID it will auto-fetch from in Tier 2.

us10y.label: US 10Y Treasury
us10y.note: easing slightly; rate-path repricing into the Fed meeting

fedFunds.label: Fed Funds Rate
fedFunds.note: held 3 meetings; tone the watch at the June meeting

usCPI.label: US CPI (YoY)
usCPI.note: 3-year high on energy; PCE the next swing data

usPCE.label: US PCE (YoY)
usPCE.note: next major US inflation swing factor for Fed tone

dxy.label: Dollar Index (DXY)
dxy.note: sub-98.5 break would broaden EM relief

source.caveat: DXY proper is ICE; DTWEXBGS is FRED's broad trade-weighted USD index — close proxy, label accordingly

biRate.label: Bank Indonesia Rate
biRate.note: defending the rupiah; hike is holding, IDX recovering

usdidr.label: USD/IDR
usdidr.note: rupiah firming as the +25bp hike takes hold; sub-17,400 = stress easing

source.caveat: no free FRED/TE daily series; keep manual or use a market-data API in a later tier

wti.label: WTI Crude
wti.note: capped near $92; Hormuz reopening keeping a lid on
